button-builder.title: Interactive button constructor
button-builder.description: A live playground for all key `GrButton` props: change `variant`, `tone`, size, type and states without switching between separate demo cards.
button-builder.note: The best format for design review and QA: one scenario covers all component props at once and helps quickly verify accessibility of the icon-only mode.

button-state-matrix.title: Tone Ã— variant state matrix
button-state-matrix.description: A full matrix across every `tone` and `variant`, including live, `hover`, `focus` and `active`, for design review and visual regression.
button-state-matrix.note: This is the same scenario that used to live in `playground-5`: it is handy for comparing new tones and checking the state contract without manual hovering.

builder.summarySquare: Square mode makes the button icon-only, so `aria-label` should describe the action for screen readers.
builder.summaryLoading: Loading automatically disables the button and helps prevent repeated submit actions in async scenarios.
builder.summaryDisabled: Disabled preserves the visual contract of the selected variant/tone while turning off interactivity and pointer events.
builder.summaryGhost: Ghost variants work best in toolbars and dense action areas where a filled CTA would feel too heavy.
builder.summaryDefault: Combine `variant`, `tone`, `size`, and `type` to quickly verify the button contract before shipping it to a product scenario.

matrix.description: The same matrix that lived in `playground-5`: for each `tone` you can see live buttons and force-rendered `hover`, `focus`, and `active` states across all `variant`s.
